# Pisinger 1995 MCKP — local artefact checksums
#
# format: <sha256>  <relative path>  # <retrieval date UTC>  <upstream URL>
#
# IMPORTANT: As of 2026-06-05, the upstream Pisinger site does NOT host
# a separate test-instance archive (`test_mcknap.tgz`). The codes page at
# http://hjemmesider.diku.dk/~pisinger/codes.html only links to the
# solver source `mcknap.c`, which includes the instance generator
# inline (CLI: `mcknap k n r type`). "Pisinger 1995 instances" in the
# literature refers to instances regenerated by this code at the
# parameters published in §6 of the paper, not to a downloadable archive.
# See FINDING_2026_06_05.md for the discovery details and Task 1.5.1
# disposition.

60c6647341f4794cced2278a87d587df4f25a1793ca0114a1d3f454129961e75  mcknap.c  # 2026-06-05T17:44:07Z  http://hjemmesider.diku.dk/~pisinger/mcknap.c
